summary: CMS integration testing completed for all 14 pillar pages. Fixed critical bugs in 4 pages (Care, Dine, Farewell, Shop) where 'activePet' was used before being defined. All 14 API endpoints returning valid data. ArchetypeProducts modal requires logged-in user with pet profile - working correctly in design. Service images showing proper Cloudinary URLs, no generic rope toy images found.

bugs_fixed.issue: ReferenceError: activePet is not defined - pageTitle used activePet before it was defined
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved activePet definition before pageTitle calculation

bugs_fixed.issue: ReferenceError: activePet is not defined - pageTitle used activePet before it was defined
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved activePet definition before pageTitle calculation

bugs_fixed.issue: ReferenceError: activePet is not defined - ShopPage uses selectedPet, not activePet
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed activePet to selectedPet in pageTitle calculation

backend_api_tests.service_images: Verified - All services have Cloudinary URLs (no generic rope toy images)

frontend_tests.stay_page: ✅ PASS - 'Places Your Pet Feels at Home'

archetype_products_modal.note: Requires logged-in user with currentPet from PillarContext. Component correctly returns null when no pet is selected.

verified_features: All 14 pillar page-config API endpoints return 200 OK
CMS config loading successfully on all pillar pages (console logs confirm '[PillarPage] CMS config loaded')
ArchetypeProducts component uses ProductDetailModal with createPortal for proper modal rendering
Service images are proper Cloudinary URLs (e.g., https://res.cloudinary.com/duoapcx1p/image/upload/...)
Curated Bundles loading on all pillar pages
Product cards have click handlers for modal opening
critical_code_review_comments: Variable ordering issue: In multiple pages, pageTitle was calculated using activePet/selectedPet before the variable was defined. This is a common pattern that should be audited across all pages to ensure variables are defined before use.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 pillar pages now have working CMS integration. ArchetypeProducts component (Party picks section) requires logged-in user with pet profile to display - this is by design. The fix for 4 pages (Care, Dine, Farewell, Shop) involved ensuring variables are defined before use in pageTitle calculations.
